title: Access Denied
description: Allows for full control of Access to Dimensions.
body:
![Kinetic Hosting](https://f0xmods.com/uploads/KH-CurseForge-FinalWideBanner-Small1.png) # Access Denied [![CurseForge](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/917449.svg?badge_style=for_the_badge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/access-denied) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-NA?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=000000&color=00AF5C)](https://modrinth.com/project/accessdenied) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-NA?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=000000&color=5865F2)](https://discord.gg/d9QGPrG7bn) Access Denied allows server owners and modpack developers to have complete control over players' access to dimensions. This mod's extensive customizability allows you to either disable certain dimensions entirely, or setup various requirements the players must complete before being able to access that specific dimension. The following information is up-to-date as of `v7.0.0`.

### Loader & Version Compatibility `v7.0.0` is available already for `NeoForge` and `Fabric` `1.21.1`. It's in the works for `Forge` and `Fabric` `1.20.1`!

### Access Requirements Requirements are objectives the player needs to meet or conditions that need to be completed. The mod has a very extensive list! **Dimensions can also be disabled all-together.** Requirements can be created directly in-game with the Requirements Builder! No need to mess with config files. If you are an OP on the server, you will see a special button in your pause menu, which is the Requirements Builder, which automatically guides you through all the steps and builds requirements for you. Requirements can be fully customized, adding only the ones you want, skipping any To sync requirements anytime, OPs can use the command `/sync-requirements`. Here's a list of currently implemented requirements:
Spoiler - Disabled (disable the dimension) - Blocks Broken - Blocks Placed - Experience Level - Player Kills - Mob Kills - Playtime - Items In Inventory - Effects - Health - Deaths - Chance (ulterior chance roll needed to access the dimension) - Advancements - FTB Quests - Jumps - Times Fished - Mob Bounties (how many of specific mobs has to be killed) - Block Bounties (how many of specific blocks have to be mined) - Location Biome - Location Dimension - Free Inventory Slots - Date (irl date the dimension opens at)
#### Mod Integration Access Denied has integration for FTB Quests, Trinkets (Fabric), and Curios API (Forge + NeoForge). Since `v8.0.0` mod developers will be able to create addons for Access Denied. Documentation for how to do so will be provided shortly after release. #### Technical Support Please join [The Fox's Den](https://discord.gg/etWwCMDGFH) Discord server if you need further assistance.
